objects.name: pdfeditor.js
objects.description: Main, heavily obfuscated JavaScript file responsible for malicious activity and limited UI.

objects.name: Utilityaddon.node
objects.description: Custom NodeJS module (native x64 DLL) used to create/delete registry entries and scheduled tasks.

objects.name: app.asar
objects.description: Electron archive containing bundled scripts and modules for PDF Editor and S3-Forge.

objects.name: appsuite-print.js
objects.description: Obfuscated JavaScript file used in AppSuite Print decoy application.

objects.name: S3-Forge
objects.description: Unsigned binary for S3-Forge decoy application.

objects.name: AppSuite PDF Editor
objects.description: Electron-based PDF editor application used as a decoy for TamperedChef malware campaign.

objects.name: AppSuite Print
objects.description: Electron-based print utility application, similar to PDF Editor, abandoned by threat actors.

objects.name: S3-Forge
objects.description: Successor decoy application based on PDF Editor concept, under development.

objects.name: Utilityaddon.node
objects.description: Custom NodeJS module for registry and scheduled task manipulation.
Autorun registry entry created for persistence.
